name: Parkash Sweets — Voice Order to GHL

parameters.content:
## Parkash Sweets — Voice Order to GHL

Triggered by: `place_order` in the voice agent (`server/tools.py`)
Webhook path: `/webhook/parkash-sweets-order`

**Flow:** Webhook → Format Data → Upsert GHL Contact → IF success → Create Note + Send SMS

**Credentials required:** GHL PIT token is hardcoded. Replace `YOUR_GHL_PIT_TOKEN` with the real token if rotating.
**Location ID:** `17GczvGNGevvP7fAihax` (Parkash Sweets)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'SMS', contactId: $('GHL Upsert Contact').item.json.contact.id, message: $('Format Order Data').item.json.smsText }) }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Order synced to GHL. Contact upserted, note created, SMS sent.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: GHL contact upsert failed. Order was confirmed to customer but not synced to CRM. Investigate GHL response.
